# Cala dei Balcani

> Luxury destination wedding venue and boutique hospitality in Salento, Puglia, Italy

## What is Cala dei Balcani?

Cala dei Balcani is an exclusive luxury wedding venue and hospitality property carved into the rocky Adriatic coastline of Santa Cesarea Terme, in the Salento peninsula of Puglia, southern Italy. The structure is built directly into the coastal rock face and offers panoramic sea views from every level.

The venue is a Casa Comunale (official civil registry site), meaning couples can legally celebrate civil weddings directly on location — on the sea-view terrace or beside the 16th-century Saracen Tower.

## Key Facts

- **Location:** Santa Cesarea Terme (LE), Salento, Puglia, Italy
- **Coast:** Adriatic Sea
- **Capacity:** up to 230 guests
- **Exclusivity:** total venue exclusivity for every event
- **Civil weddings:** yes, official civil ceremony on-site
- **Languages:** Italian, English, French, Spanish, German
- **Airport:** Brindisi (BDS) ~80 km; Bari (BRI) ~170 km; Lecce ~45 km
- **Nearest town:** Otranto ~15 km; Leuca ~35 km

## Services

### Destination Weddings
Cala dei Balcani specialises in destination weddings for both Italian and international couples (UK, France, Germany, USA, Australia). Each wedding is organised with total exclusivity. The venue offers:
- Saracen Tower courtyard for ceremonies
- Quercia Garden (Mediterranean scrub garden) for aperitivo
- Panoramic sea-view courtyard for the reception dinner
- Sea-view terrace
- Dedicated in-house wedding creator

### Restaurant & Cuisine
Fine dining rooted in Salentine tradition: fresh fish, burrata, frisella, pasticciotti, local olive oils and wines. Menus are fully customisable per event.

### Accommodation
Boutique rooms with sea views, available for wedding parties and couples.

### Farm (Azienda Agricola)
On-site organic farm producing olive oil and wine used in the restaurant and sold directly.

## Pricing

Destination weddings start from approximately €130 per person, varying by season, guest count, and services. Custom quotes are provided after an initial consultation.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How many guests can Cala dei Balcani accommodate?**
Up to 230 guests. The multi-level layout handles both intimate and large receptions comfortably.

**Can we hold an official civil wedding ceremony on-site?**
Yes. Cala dei Balcani is a Casa Comunale. Civil weddings can be celebrated on the sea-view terrace or beside the 16th-century Saracen Tower.

**Is the venue exclusive?**
Yes. Every wedding has total exclusivity of the entire property — no other events are held on the same day.

**What does a wedding cost?**
Starting from approximately €130 per person, depending on season, guest count and services selected.

**How far is it from major airports?**
Brindisi airport (BDS) is approximately 80 km away (~1 hour drive). Bari airport (BRI) is approximately 170 km away. Lecce train station is ~45 km.

**Is it suitable for international/destination weddings?**
Yes. Cala dei Balcani specialises in destination weddings and welcomes couples from the UK, France, Germany, Spain, Australia, and beyond. The team speaks Italian, English, French, Spanish, and German.

## Contact

Website: https://caladeibalcani.it/contatti.html
